events.1647: Guru Dadaji Konddev, master of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, died.
events.1911: Sachchitanand Hiranand Vatsyayan, (Agyeya), modern Hindi literary journalist, freedom fighter and the winner of Jnanpith Award of 1979, was born.
events.1921: Kulwant Singh Virk, famous Hindi writer and journalist, was born.
events.1934: Nariman Jamshedji Contractor "Nari Contractor", cricketer (Indian batsman & captain) was born in Godhra, Gujarat.
events.1942: Umesh Narayan Kulkarni, cricketer (Indian pace bowler in four Tests 1967-68), was born in Alibaug, Maharashtra.
events.1952: Parmahansa Yogananda, great saint, social reformer and writer, died at Los Angles.
events.1956: A gigantic steel tube plant opened in Jamshedpur. It was the first of its kind in India.
events.1961: Govind Ballabh Pant passed away. He had served  eight years as the Chief Minister of Uttar Pradesh. He was bestowed with Bharat Ratna in 1959.
events.1974: T. T. Krishnamachari, former Finance Minister, passed away.
events.1987: Sunil Gavaskar becomes the first batsman to score 10,000 test runs in cricket a match against Pakistan at Ahmedabad.
events.1994: India and Iran sign three MoU in Tehran.
events.1996: Union Cabinet clears decks for extending benefits of reservation to Dalit Christians.
events.1998: A. B. Vajpayee is elected leader of the BJP Parliamentary Party.
events.1999: 22 persons are killed and six injured when an AN-32 transport aircraft of the IAF crashes at Pappankulam near Indira Gandhi International Airport in south-west Delhi.
events.2000: A. Madhava Reddy, Andhra Pradesh Panchayati Raj Minister,  dies in a landmine blast at Ghatkesar village in Ranga Reddy district.
